name: control mapping validator accepts a control entry with all four section 2.9 required fields populated
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-control-mapping.sh" --controls controls.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf '%b
' '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: not-applicable' > controls.yaml
